scripts.build: npm run build -w @olow/memory && npm run build -w @olow/engine && npm run build -w @olow/react-agent && npm run build -w @olow/navigate-agent && npm run build -w olow-app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @olow/memory && npm run typecheck -w @olow/engine && npm run typecheck -w @olow/react-agent && npm run typecheck -w @olow/navigate-agent && npm run typecheck -w olow-app
